description_long: This is a stylized adult female pedestrian with an athletic build, standing upright with arms relaxed at her sides. She wears a fitted, long-sleeve top with a v-neck and rolled-up sleeves, paired with slim pants that reach her ankles. Her footwear consists of open-toe sandals with straps, and she has a distinctive high ponytail with long, straight hair extending down her back. The character's facial features are sharp and angular, with a confident expression and no visible accessories or carried items. The overall appearance suggests a modern, urban style suitable for city environments. The surface finish is smooth and matte, typical of stylized digital characters.
description: A stylized adult female pedestrian in fitted urban clothing, standing upright with a high ponytail and open-toe sandals.
description_view_0: Front view shows the v-neck top, slim pants, open-toe sandals, and facial features with arms at sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the high ponytail, profile of the face, and the fitted nature of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the long ponytail extending down the back, the back of the top, and the slim fit of the pants.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the ponytail, side profile, and the contours of the outfit.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted long-sleeve v-neck top and slim pants with open-toe sandals
